subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thine esteemed companion arrived at the threshold of the Greatest Name and laid his head upon the dust in supplication [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز الهی قرین محترم باستان اسم اعظم واصل و سر بر تراب درگاه بنهاد و طلب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @petitions to authorities
